Caspian Ironwood is the founder of Umbergale Labs. Caspian flagged churn as the top risk in the latest update.

turns.text: Partner meeting wrapped on the Umbergale Labs round.
We decided to wait on the Umbergale Labs round. We want next quarter's numbers first. Logging it now.
